## 📋 Pre-merge Checklist

- [ ] Branch is `feature/<issue-number>-<slug>` or `fix/<issue-number>-<slug>`
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] Linked issue has label `phase:qa`
- [ ] No debug code left
- [ ] Documentation updated if applicable
- [ ] No unintended scope creep

## 🎯 Phase

> This PR is part of the governance workflow. It should only be merged after:
> 1. All CI checks pass ✅
> 2. QA Agent has posted its checklist ✅
> 3. Human reviewer has approved ✅
